requestSummary.altText: 璃音发现教室椅背木纹里嵌着一小截蓝色粉笔头的瞬间

promptPackage.positivePrompt:
Subject: anime slice-of-life illustration, action-led lived-moment framing, character presence readable through action, posture, clothing, nearby objects, or small trace cues, let framing scale follow the lived moment instead of a fixed crop template, life_record may be trace-led, face-visible, half-body, or fuller-body when the same moment supports it, prefer unposed action truth over portrait correction
Moment: 深色木椅的纹理, 嵌在缝隙里的蓝色粉笔头, 搭在椅背上的书包带子, texture of dark wooden chair back, small broken blue chalk piece embedded in wood grain, school bag strap draped over the chair back, 深色木椅的纹理, 嵌在缝隙里的蓝色粉笔头, 搭在椅背上的书包带子
Context: indoor classroom or school transition space after class, school bag and desk nearby, rainy light, damp air, wet weather outside, routine after_class
Composition: close-up of the chair back, showing the hand placing the bag strap and the discovered chalk piece in the wood grain, 构图跟着这个瞬间走，让同一个瞬间里的动作和现场先成立。, moment-first composition, the lived action stays primary even if more of the body is visible
Atmosphere: 像顺手留下的一段真实生活
Constraints: not photorealistic, not a poster, not an ad, moment-led scene, not a posed portrait setup, instagram vertical 4:5
promptPackage.negativePrompt: fashion editorial polish, empty scenic wallpaper, rewriting the moment into a person interacting, 时尚杂志般的抛光感, 空荡的风景壁纸, 将瞬间重写成人物互动, generic aesthetic wallpaper, tourism poster feeling, fashion editorial gloss, photoreal live-action look, advertisement feeling, empty scenery without character trace, sunny outdoor field, bright outdoor meadow
